properties.name: clients.user-service.host
properties.description: Hostname or IP address of the User Service.

properties.name: clients.user-service.port
properties.description: Port used to connect to the User Service.

properties.name: clients.product-service.host
properties.description: Hostname or IP address of the Product Service.

properties.name: clients.product-service.port
properties.description: Port used to connect to the Product Service.

properties.name: grpc.client.productService.negotiationType
properties.description: Negotiation type for gRPC connection to Product Service (e.g., PLAIN_TEXT, TLS).

properties.name: grpc.client.productService.address
properties.description: gRPC server address for Product Service (e.g., localhost:9090).

properties.name: grpc.client.userService.address
properties.description: gRPC server address for User Service (e.g., localhost:9091).

properties.name: grpc.client.userService.negotiationType
properties.description: Negotiation type for gRPC connection to User Service (e.g., PLAIN_TEXT, TLS).
